title: EventStream
description: A durable, partitioned event log (a topic), realized by a streaming Provider such as redpanda.

partitions.description: Partition count; increases apply in place, decreases are rejected by the broker.

replication.description: Replication factor (default 1). Must not exceed the realizing Provider's broker count (configuration.brokers), and redpanda additionally requires an odd factor (Raft quorum) — both refused at validate. Changing it on an existing topic is refused (Kafka cannot alter a topic's replication factor in place); recreate the EventStream instead. docs/adr/017.
